message:
perf(frankenterm-core): add #[inline] to trivial accessors (bd-1ffmj)

Add #[inline] to 17 trivial accessor methods for cross-crate inlining:
- scrollback.rs: ScrollbackWindow (viewport_range, render_range,
  viewport_len, render_len), ScrollbackLine (len, is_empty),
  Scrollback (capacity, len, is_empty, peek_newest, get)
- patch.rs: DirtySpan (len, is_empty), ChangeRun (len, is_empty),
  GridPatch (is_empty, len)
- cell.rs: HyperlinkRegistry (is_empty), Cell (content, width,
  is_wide, is_wide_continuation)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
